response: A senior recruiter in the pharmaceutical industry, specifically focused on production and supply chain roles in France, is responsible for identifying and attracting qualified professionals who work in the manufacturing, logistics, and distribution of pharmaceutical products. This role involves sourcing candidates, conducting interviews, and ensuring that the right talent is recruited and placed in suitable positions within the French pharmaceutical sector. The recruiter may also be involved in building and maintaining relationships with employers in the industry, understanding the specific requirements of the production and supply chain functions, and staying informed about industry trends and regulatory changes.
